title: crotalaria decora
intro: Crotalaria decora, also known as the "Showy rattle box" or "Horse-bean," is a flowering plant species native to Australia and Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria decora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Crotalaria decora is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or powder for its medicinal uses, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs for enhanced benefits.
